message:
fix(core): use precomputed num_columns for rowid-alias payload detection

The payload_includes_rowid_alias check compared values.len() against
columns.len() (the full schema slice) instead of the already-computed
num_columns variable. This could misdetect the payload boundary when
the two diverge. Also simplifies the related test assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
